adjudication_notes: No-write/synthetic confirmed: every catalog row and run result is a frozen descriptor object; no function executes tenant/matter/permission/audit-hint checks or audit append/mutate/delete/query/export/admin review, and none persists idempotency keys, acquires/persists locks, executes rollback/retry, renders UI, writes Hermes runtime, or executes Claude. freezeNoWriteResult spreads result first then overrides all attestation flags false, so they always win.

Coverage reconciles: 40 covered units across RP03.P02.M07.S07-RP03.P02.M09.S02 (M07 S07-S22=16, M08 S01-S22=22, M09 S01-S02=2), first=RP03.P02.M07.S07, last=RP03.P02.M09.S02, all unique. Deliverable counts (implementation16/ui6/claude_review2/failure_recovery4/test8/contract2/security_audit2) and evidence_mode counts (test_golden_case16/hermes_evidence_packet22/claude_review_packet2) both total 40 and match tests/validator.

Binding alignment confirmed: contract schema v0.4, current_pack and service_interface_workflow_evidence_pack set to CP00-137 Risk B 40 units, production flag audit_compliance_service_interface_workflow_evidence_verified, next CP00-138 / RP03.P02.M09.S03, upstream CP00-136. All 11 declared public exports exist in the new module and index re-export, and the RP03 validator enforces each.

Privacy/leakage clean: hidden_source_fields is a redaction denylist (includes cross_tenant_row_count and secret/credential/token/key names) carried as metadata only; run results report unauthorized_count_exposed=false and hidden_field_names_exposed=false with no_real_data=true. No actual sensitive values are present.

History preserved and authority boundaries intact: CP135 entry_readiness and CP136 service_interface_readiness contract blocks, plan lookups, imports, and tests are retained while current_pack advances to CP00-137. Hermes packet writes_hermes_runtime=false and Claude packet read_only=true/executes_review=false (model claude-opus-4-8) keep them evidence/review surfaces only; implements_ldip=false and splits_hrx_product=false.
